CREATE TABLE array_test (id INTEGER, arr INTEGER[3]);
INSERT INTO array_test VALUES (1, [10, 20, 30]), (2, [40, 50, 60]);
SELECT id, arr[1] AS first_element FROM array_test;
SELECT id, arr[2] AS second_element FROM array_test;
SELECT id, arr[3] AS third_element FROM array_test;
SELECT id, arr[1:2] AS elements FROM array_test;
SELECT id, list_extract(arr, 1) AS first_element_extracted FROM array_test;
SELECT id, array_extract(arr, 1) AS first_element_array_extracted FROM array_test;
CREATE TABLE nested_array_test (id INTEGER, arr_nested INTEGER[2][2]);
INSERT INTO nested_array_test VALUES (1, [[1, 2], [3, 4]]), (2, [[5, 6], [7, 8]]);
SELECT id, arr_nested[1][1] AS nested_first_element FROM nested_array_test;
CREATE TABLE array_table_a (id INTEGER, arr_a INTEGER[3]);
CREATE TABLE array_table_b (id INTEGER, arr_b INTEGER[3]);
INSERT INTO array_table_a VALUES (1, [1, 2, 3]), (2, [4, 5, 6]);
INSERT INTO array_table_b VALUES (1, [7, 8, 9]), (2, [10, 11, 12]);
SELECT a.id, array_cross_product(a.arr_a, b.arr_b) AS cross_product FROM array_table_a a JOIN array_table_b b ON a.id = b.id;
SELECT a.id, array_cosine_similarity(a.arr_a, b.arr_b) AS cosine_similarity FROM array_table_a a JOIN array_table_b b ON a.id = b.id;
CREATE TABLE complex_type_test (id INTEGER, arr_struct_array STRUCT<field1 INTEGER, field2 INTEGER>[2]);
INSERT INTO complex_type_test VALUES (1, [ROW(1, 2), ROW(3, 4)]), (2, [ROW(5, 6), ROW(7, 8)]);
SELECT id, arr_struct_array[1].field1 AS struct_first_field FROM complex_type_test;
SELECT id, arr_struct_array[1:2] AS struct_elements FROM complex_type_test;
SELECT id, array_value(arr_struct_array[1].field1, arr_struct_array[2].field2) AS combined_fields FROM complex_type_test;
